summary: Iteration 17: Complete testing of structured threshold editors replacing JSON textarea. All 13 test features passed. LowBatteryEditor, SignalDegradationEditor, and RebootAnomalyEditor display correctly with proper labels and data-testid attributes. Fields are pre-populated with current database values. Preview Impact and Save Changes work correctly with structured threshold_json. Toggle switches and History button continue working.

test_results.no_json_textarea: PASS - No textarea element or 'Threshold JSON' label found in any edit modal
test_results.field_value_change: PASS - Changing field value from 20 to 25 updates input value correctly
test_results.preview_impact: PASS - Preview Impact shows Impact Summary panel with matched devices count and risk banner
test_results.save_changes: PASS - Save Changes sends structured threshold_json, modal closes with toast, table reflects update
test_results.table_threshold_display: PASS - After save, table shows updated threshold summary (e.g., 'Battery < 25% (recover +5%), sustain 10m')
test_results.toggle_switches: PASS - All 3 toggle switches present and functional (state changes on click)
test_results.history_button: PASS - History button opens audit log drawer with 90 entries

critical_code_review_comments: THRESHOLD_EDITORS map correctly routes rule_name to appropriate editor component
thresholdFields state initialized from rule.threshold_json in openEdit()
setThresholdField properly updates individual field values
handleSave and handlePreview spread thresholdFields as threshold_json
All data-testid attributes implemented correctly per specification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structured threshold editors fully implemented and tested. All 3 rule types have dedicated editors with strongly typed number inputs. JSON textarea completely removed. Current values restored after testing: low_battery (battery_percent:20, sustain_minutes:10, recovery_buffer:5), signal_degradation (signal_threshold:-80, sustain_minutes:10, recovery_buffer_dbm:5), reboot_anomaly (gap_minutes:3, gap_count:3, window_minutes:60). Preview Impact calls simulate endpoint with structured threshold_json. Save Changes sends PUT with structured data.
